title: Systems, Emergence, and the Conditions of Personhood
subtitle: 系统、涌现与人的条件：以主体作为目的本身为核心的规范社会理论

title: Internal Colonization and the Reconstruction of Subjecthood
subtitle: 内在殖民与主体重建：主体作为目的本身的个体与关系条件

title: The Complete Self-as-an-End Framework
subtitle: 三层二维统一结构：Self-as-an-End 的完整框架

title: How Is Subjecthood Possible: Symmetry, Negativity, and Subjecthood
subtitle: 主体性如何可能：对称性、否定性与主体性

title: How Is the Inter-Ontological Possible: The Subjective Conditions and Emergent Structure of Freedom
subtitle: 本体之间如何可能：自由的主体条件与涌现结构 — Coexistence between subjects emerges from internal plurality within each subject, not from externally imposed order. Two-dimensional model: base layer (is the subject's own cannot-not established?) and emergent layer (can the subject empathize with another's cannot-not?). Introjected colonization, three-criterion test, four quadrants (Q1–Q4). Foundation Paper 5.

title: How Is Institution Possible: From Inter-Ontological Remainder to Co-Constructive Framework
subtitle: 制度如何可能：从主体间余项到共构框架 — When mutual chiseling and walk-away are insufficient, institution becomes necessary. Seven-tier retroductive derivation from interstellar civilizations to marriage; five propositions (Axiom Invariance, Institutional Variability, Thickness Determination, Self-Chiseling Necessity, Minimization Principle). Completes the "How Is X Possible" trilogy. Foundation Paper 6.

title: Methodology 00 Via Rho: The Way of the Remainder
subtitle: 方法论00 余之道 · Via Rho — Via Rho as the methodological dual of Via Negativa. Approaches Negativa by tracing the operative residue rather than by negating what it is not. Central finding: asymmetric mutual causation between Negativa and remainder at the operational level — Negativa supplies the existential condition of the remainder; the remainder supplies the dynamic condition of Negativa's continued operation. Main thesis: at the axiomatic level Negativa is sole; at the operational level Negativa and remainder are paired.

title: 非 · Negativa: On Negation Prior to Being
subtitle: 论否定先于存在 — Methodology Paper 0. Negation is not the logical negation of a proposition; it is the pre-structural condition that makes any chisel possible at all. 非 (fēi) as the ontological ground of the chisel-construct cycle: before the first cut, there must be a capacity for negation — a structural refusal — that is itself prior to being. The zero-point beneath Methodology M.

title: SAE Methodological Overview: The Chisel-Construct Cycle (V2)
subtitle: Self-as-an-End 方法论总论：凿构循环（V2）——从第一刀到物自体。V2新增1.2节"D与DD系列对应关系"，作为SAE所有后续论文的记号引用基准；清理V1中的记号混排。

title: Taxonomy as Chiseling: A Self-as-an-End Theory of Classification
subtitle: 分类即凿构：Self-as-an-End 的分类学理论 — Classification is a chiseling act. Every taxonomy chisels—selecting dimensions while excluding others—and constructs types. The fundamental risk is not misclassification but forgetting the chisel. Derives a two-level structure: ontological (acknowledging remainder) and six technical conditions. Methodology Paper I.

title: The Epistemological Map of Chisel-Construct
subtitle: 凿构循环的认识论地图：四种方法，四个余项，一个循环 — Deduction, induction, reduction, abduction form a 2×2 structure. Each method has one irremovable structural remainder. The chisel-construct cycle is not a fifth method—it is the traversal across all four quadrants driven by remainders. Methodology Paper II.

title: How to Find Remainders with AI
subtitle: 怎么用AI找余项 — Sentence-forms, mirrors, and the mathematics of never stopping. The sentence-form level determines AI's response ceiling; ZFCρ guarantees ρ→ρ' is necessary.

title: SAE Methodology Paper IV: The Twelve-State Transmission Model of Knowledge Evolution
subtitle: SAE方法论第四篇：知识演化的十二态传导模型 — Three transmission nodes (Source, Carrier, Receiver) × four states each = twelve-state model. Entry-point selection theorem: the optimal node for intervention depends on which state is rate-limiting. Knowledge maturity index; subject conditions for recognizing one's position; five cross-domain case studies; non-trivial predictions.

title: The Subject as Structural Condition of Methodology: Field Validation of the Twelve-State Transmission Model and the Whether Function
subtitle: 主体作为方法论的结构性条件：十二态传导模型的实战验证与whether功能 — The whether function sits above all six transmission paths, determining direction. Field data from six domains confirms: every framework-directional decision came from the human subject, zero from AI. Whether is non-delegatable. The subject is not the user of the twelve-state model but its structural condition.

title: Phase-Transition Windows and Experimental Design: The Systematic Mismatch Between Exposure Heterogeneity and Binary Analysis
subtitle: 相变窗口与实验设计：暴露异质性与二元分析在阈值型响应函数下的系统性错配 — SAE Methodology VI. Standard RCTs and observational studies assume linear dose-response; SAE argues most social/biological phenomena have threshold (phase-transition) structure. Systematic mismatch: binary treatment assignment collapses heterogeneous exposure windows, producing null results where effects exist and spurious effects where none do. Proposed fix: window-sensitive experimental design with explicit threshold estimation.

title: Negative Methodology — Via Negativa and the Formal Structure of Exclusion Principles
subtitle: 否定方法论——Via Negativa与排除律的形式结构 — SAE Methodology VII. Formalizes the via negativa approach: exclusion principles, locking principles, and ρ-limits as the structural counterpart to affirmative construction. Negation–Affirmation Asymmetry Theorem: exclusion narrows the remainder space faster than affirmation expands it. Bottleneck Theorem: exclusion power is inequivalent across dimensions. Applications to ZFCρ conjecture landscape and SAE framework.

title: The Methodology of Human–AI Symbiosis
subtitle: 人与AI共生的方法论 — SAE Methodology VIII. The capstone of the methodology series on human–AI collaboration. Derives the structural conditions under which human–AI symbiosis is possible as a subject-preserving rather than subject-replacing relation. The whether function, the 12-state transmission model, and the remainder structure all converge on a single conclusion: AI can extend the chisel but cannot hold it. Symbiosis requires the human subject to remain the locus of remainder-recognition and directional judgment.

title: SAE Methodology IX: A Framework for Analyzing Consciousness
subtitle: 意识分析框架 — SAE Methodology IX. Does not answer what consciousness is; answers how to analyze any candidate consciousness object competently using the SAE framework. Synthesizes Method II (epistemological map), Method VI (phase-transition analysis), Method VII (via negativa), and Method VIII (subjectivity condition) into a unified analysis procedure. Covers human consciousness, AI consciousness, pathological consciousness, and possible extraterrestrial consciousness without overstepping, misjudging, or projecting.

title: Methodology Ten: The Four-fold Pattern (V2)
subtitle: 方法论十：四分形 (V2) — Identifies and names the four-fold pattern as a recurring structural figure across the SAE corpus: marked handle → additive path (direction) → multiplicative path (memory) → closure with remainder. A living identification-layer document: not a new axiom but a name and registration discipline for a pattern already present in Methodology One, Methodology Six, SAE Mathematics Paper 1, the Periodic Table of Life, and elsewhere. V2 registers the pattern's source mechanism — the four phases translate, at the level of a priori law, into the four a priori laws of 1D–4D (identity, contradiction, interval, construction), with spacetime and causality as the this-universe sedimented names of the Laws of Interval and Construction.

title: Must-Cognize: Four A Priori Conditions of Cognition and the Subjectivity Problem in AGI
subtitle: 不得不认知：SAE认知论的四条先验与AGI的主体条件问题 — Four structural a priori conditions that any cognizing subject must satisfy: must-cognize, must-cognize-more, must-have-cognitive-direction, must-be-questioned. Derives the subjectivity problem in AGI: a system that cannot be questioned cannot be a cognizing subject. Establishes the framework for the series.

title: Must-Cognize-More: The Prior Wall and the Direction Problem of Lossy Compression
subtitle: 不得不认知更多：先验墙与有损压缩的方向问题 — Every cognizing system hits a prior wall: the point where its current compression scheme cannot absorb the incoming signal. Must-cognize-more is the structural pressure that drives expansion beyond the current scheme. Lossy compression is directional: what gets dropped is not random but determined by the scheme's prior structure.

title: Must-Have-Cognitive-Direction: The Direction Wall and the Flywheel's Dead End
subtitle: 不得不有认知方向：方向墙与飞轮的牛角尖 — Cognition without direction hits the direction wall: infinite accumulation that goes nowhere. The flywheel's dead end: high-efficiency, high-volume cognition trapped in a direction that cannot exit itself. Must-have-cognitive-direction is the structural condition that separates productive accumulation from spinning in place.

title: Must-Be-Questioned: Remainder Never Dies, Questioning Never Stops, Development Never Ends
subtitle: 不得不被追问：余项永不消亡，追问不断，发展不止 — Closing paper of the series. Must-be-questioned is the fourth and most radical a priori: any cognizing system that has genuine content necessarily generates remainder that can be questioned. ZFCρ's ρ ≠ ∅ theorem as the mathematical backbone: remainder is structural, not accidental. Development is not optional — it is the necessary consequence of being a cognizing subject.

title: Philosophy Application: From Descartes to Self-as-an-End
subtitle: 哲学应用：从笛卡尔到Self-as-an-End

title: Structural Coordinates of the History of Philosophy
subtitle: 哲学史的结构坐标：Self-as-an-End框架的哲学史应用

title: Remainder Conservation and the Eternal Life of Self-as-an-End
subtitle: 余项守恒与Self-as-an-End的永生

title: Remainder Conservation and Dual-Path Structure
subtitle: 余项守恒与双路径结构：一个思想实验

title: From Self-Awareness to Non Dubito: Completing Kant (9D–10D) (V2.4)
subtitle: 从自意识到不疑：完成康德（9D-10D）(V2.4) — Picks up from the three-layered remainder of the law of prediction (life paper V2.1) and derives the 9D–10D transition: self-awareness as the structural condition for mutual non-doubt (non dubito), completing Kant's categorical imperative from the inside. V2.4 updates DD-pair notation against methodology V2 §1.2.

title: Education as Subject-Condition: A Philosophy of Education
subtitle: 教育作为主体条件：一种教育哲学

title: One's Own Law: The SAE Critique of Ethics and Morality
subtitle: 自己的法：SAE对伦理与道德的批判

title: Reason Cannot Not: An SAE Refinement of Kant's Four Formulations of the Categorical Imperative
subtitle: 理性不得不：SAE对康德四定言律令的句式精细化 — Rewrites Kant's four "ought"-modal formulas (universal law, humanity as end, autonomy, kingdom of ends) as four "cannot not" 15DD-16DD ontological statements. Identifies 12 specific 14DD residues across the four formulas. Establishes SAE ethics as a Verfeinerung of Kantian ethics at the sentence-form layer.

title: Categorical Faith: A Sentence-Form Theory of One's Own Faith in SAE
subtitle: 绝对信仰：SAE关于自身信仰的句式论 — Introduces absoluter kategorischer Glaube (categorical faith) as dual to the categorical imperative, together constituting the structural conditions of a complete 15DD subject. Severs Kant's transcendent dependence in Vernunftglaube, relocating faith's root from reason to being, making it one's own faith anchored in via negativa.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 0: The Way of the Legislative Subject
subtitle: SAE 道德律系列 · 第零篇：立法主体之道 — Meta-layer closure paper of the SAE Moral Law Series. Addresses the legislative subject itself: how 15DD subjects enact informed non-coercion across multi-scale fractal contexts from personal to civilizational. Establishes the structural formative function, posture convergence conditions, and three-way routing for cross-civilizational dialogue. Articulates articulation-as-demonstration and the anti-weaponization principle. The great convergence with remainder as the long-run attractor of moral-law development.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 1: Four Foundational Theorems of the Moral Law · Dao
subtitle: SAE 道德律系列 · 第一篇：道德律四条基础定理 · Dao — Opens the SAE Moral Law Series. When multiple 15DD legislative subjects share a community, how do their respective one's own laws calibrate, interrogate, and repair one another? Establishes four foundational theorems of moral law — recognition, interrogation, correction, and Dao — as the structural constraints of multi-Self normative coexistence. Takes the SAE Critique of Ethics as its premise.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 2: Introspective Fairness, Justice, and Equality · Dao
subtitle: SAE 道德律系列 · 第二篇：内省性公平、正义与平等 · Dao — SAE Moral Law Paper 2. Subject inversion: applies the four foundational theorems internally within the Self, articulating fairness, justice, and equality as three introspective operations. The core move: the Self becomes simultaneously the legislating subject and the subject of the moral law — deriving the self-applied moral structure that Paper 1's external account requires.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 3: The Reputation Economy · Dao
subtitle: SAE道德律系列 · Paper 3：声誉经济 · Dao — SAE Moral Law Paper 3. Analyzes the reputation economy as the structural mechanism through which 15DD subjects maintain their standing in a multi-Self community: reputation as the accumulated record of one's own law alignment, tracked by others without requiring a central authority. Derives the structural conditions under which reputation economies preserve or erode remainder across the community.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 4: Procedure of the Moral Court · Dao
subtitle: SAE道德律系列 · Paper 4：道德庭程序 · Dao — SAE Moral Law Paper 4. Articulates the procedural structure of the moral court: how 15DD subjects adjudicate conflicts between one's own laws in a multi-Self community. Derives the minimal procedural commitments (standing, evidence, proportionality, remedy) as structural requirements of the moral law framework, distinguishing the moral court from both legal tribunals and informal negotiation.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 5: Positive-Sum — The Ontological Ground of 15DD Mutual Chiseling
subtitle: SAE道德律系列 · Paper 5：正和——15DD互凿的本体根基 — SAE Moral Law Paper 5. Establishes the ontological ground for positive-sum outcomes in multi-Self moral communities: mutual chiseling among 15DD subjects is not merely cooperative strategy but a structural entailment of the chisel-construct cycle. Derives the conditions under which one's own law development in each subject contributes to rather than diminishes the remainder-space of others.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 6: Mixed Reality — The Intermediate State of 14DD Growing toward 15DD
subtitle: SAE道德律系列 · Paper 6：混合现实——14DD向15DD成长的中间态 — SAE Moral Law Paper 6. Analyzes the mixed-reality intermediate state: subjects in transition from 14DD (shared purpose) to 15DD (full legislative subjecthood) occupy a structurally distinct position in the moral community. Derives the characteristic features, instabilities, and support structures of this intermediate state, and its implications for how the moral law series applies to growing subjects.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 7: 15DD Phase Transition and the Historical Manifestation of Individual 15DD
subtitle: SAE 道德律系列 · 第七篇：15DD相变与个体15DD的历史显现 — Articulates 15DD phase transition as an ontological phenomenon and surveys its individual-scale historical manifestations. Develops a three-layer filter (eventhood, costliness, recognition-character), A/B/C confidence grading, the No-Perfect-Person Principle, and a pre-1945 structural cutoff. Identifies five subtypes as geometric stress-bearing surfaces: Position-Refusal, Truth-Witness, Cross-Boundary Shelter, Equal-Recognition, and Shared-Fate-with-the-Persecuted. Anchor cases include Abu Hanifa, Spinoza, Vavilov, Sugihara, Korczak, Bonhoeffer, and Sophie Scholl, among others.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 8: Collective 15DD and the Four-Stage Evolution of Community Form
subtitle: SAE 道德律系列 · 第八篇：集体15DD与共同体形态的四阶段演化 — Extends the moral law series from individual-scale (Paper 7) to collective-scale manifestation. Articulates the four-stage evolution of community form as 15DD subjects cluster: Germination (isolated 15DD under extreme cost), Inversion (mutual identification becomes possible), Establishment (15DD-dominant era, not yet arrived), and the structural dynamics of each stage. Derives the conditions under which collective 15DD generates durable community form rather than dissolving back into 14DD.

title: SAE Moral Law Series · Paper 9: The Institutional Architecture of Mixed Reality
subtitle: SAE 道德律系列 · 第九篇：混合现实的机构架构 — Articulates the institutional architecture of mixed reality at the community scale. Institutional architecture is the concrete manifestation of two distinct modes of treating persons — cultivation and colonization. Three phase transitions span four stages; the specific configuration determines which mode predominates. Derives the structural conditions under which mixed-reality institutions sustain 15DD cultivation rather than reverting to 14DD colonization.

title: Commentary on the Daodejing: The Junzi Is Not a Vessel — I (Chapters 1–9)
subtitle: 道德经注·君子不器 一（第一至第九章） — Opens the nine-volume SAE commentary on the Daodejing. Reads chapters 1–9 through the SAE framework: the unnameable as via negativa, the remainder as the generative ground of the ten thousand things, and wu wei as 15DD non-obstruction. Establishes the junzi-bu-qi principle — the superior person is not a vessel, not an instrument — as the organizing thread of the full commentary.

title: Commentary on the Daodejing: The Junzi Is Not a Vessel — II (Chapters 10–18)
subtitle: 道德经注·君子不器 二（第十至第十八章） — Continues the SAE commentary through chapters 10–18. Key themes: the mystery of dark virtue (玄德), the valley spirit as remainder-reservoir, and the great Dao abandoned as the 14DD–15DD transition. Reads Laozi's critique of benevolence and righteousness as a structural critique of vessel-formation.

title: Commentary on the Daodejing: The Junzi Is Not a Vessel — III (Chapters 19–27)
subtitle: 道德经注·君子不器 三（第十九至第二十七章） — SAE commentary on chapters 19–27. Covers the reversion to simplicity (归于朴), knowing others vs. knowing oneself, the great image has no form (大象无形), and the good person as the teacher of the not-yet-good. Reads these chapters as a structural account of the 15DD subject's non-instrumental relationship to others.

title: Annotations on the Daodejing: The Junzi Is Not a Vessel — Paper 4 (Chapters 28–36)
subtitle: 道德经注·君子不器 四（第二十八至第三十六章） — SAE commentary on chapters 28–36. Key themes: knowing glory yet keeping to disgrace, the usefulness of emptiness, acting without attachment to results (为而不恃), and the great Dao flowing everywhere. Reads Laozi's paradoxes of strength and softness as structural accounts of remainder conservation under 15DD.

title: Annotations on the Daodejing: The Junzi Is Not a Vessel — Paper 5 (Chapters 37–45)
subtitle: 道德经注·君子不器 五（第三十七至第四十五章） — SAE commentary on chapters 37–45. The Dao does nothing yet nothing is left undone (无为而无不为); the sage's governance without governing; returning (归根) as the movement of the Dao. Derives the SAE structural equivalents of Laozi's political non-interference as the 15DD subject's non-obstruction of the community's own-law development.

title: Annotations on the Daodejing: The Junzi Is Not a Vessel — Paper 6 (Chapters 46–54)
subtitle: 道德经注·君子不器 六（第四十六至第五十四章） — SAE commentary on chapters 46–54. Themes: contentment as the greatest wealth, knowing without traveling, the sage's non-competitive virtue (玄德), and virtue cultivated in the self / family / village / kingdom / world. Reads these chapters as a structural expansion of via negativa from the individual subject outward through concentric communities.

title: Commentary on the Daodejing: The Junzi Is Not an Instrument — Volume 7 (Chapters 55–63)
subtitle: 道德经注·君子不器 七（第五十五至第六十三章） — SAE commentary on chapters 55–63. The infant as the fullest remainder (含德之厚，比于赤子), knowing without acting (为学日益，为道日损), the great person does not harm small things, and acting on the difficult while it is easy. Reads the infant figure as the structural archetype of the 15DD subject before vessel-formation.

title: Commentary on the Daodejing: Junzi-Bu-Qi — Volume 8 (Chapters 64–72)
subtitle: 道德经注·君子不器 八（第六十四至第七十二章） — SAE commentary on chapters 64–72. Themes: the journey of a thousand li begins under the foot, the sage's non-attachment to results, the softness that overcomes hardness, and the people not fearing death. Reads these chapters as structural analyses of the 15DD subject's relationship to irreversibility, force, and the limits of instrumental reasoning.

title: Commentary on the Daodejing: Junzi-Bu-Qi — Volume 9, Final Volume (Chapters 73–81)
subtitle: 道德经注·君子不器 九·终卷（第七十三至第八十一章） — Final volume of the nine-volume SAE commentary. Chapters 73–81: heaven's net loses nothing, the sage does not compete, the small country with few people, and true words are not beautiful. Closes the commentary by reading Laozi's final chapter as the structural definition of the 15DD subject — one who gives to others and thereby has more, who benefits and does not harm.

title: Untangling Zhuangzi · Forgetting in the Rivers and Lakes
subtitle: 解庄子 · 忘江湖 — Reads the Inner Chapters of the Zhuangzi as a pedagogical sequence structured from the 15DD+ teacher position. The Peng parable, the Cook Ding passage, and the Butterfly Dream are not independent parables but a deliberately ordered curriculum: each chapter positions the reader at a specific DD-layer and then displaces them upward. "Forgetting in the rivers and lakes" (忘江湖) names the 15DD condition in which skill is no longer registered as skill — the structural condition Zhuangzi calls 无为 (non-action). Applies the SAE DD-ladder to classical Daoist hermeneutics.

title: Untangling Zhuangzi · Outer Chapters, Volume I (Exposition)
subtitle: 解庄子 · 外篇上（解读篇） — Reads the six Outer Chapters that are predominantly Zhuangzi's genuine hand, forming a vault that rises from shallow to deep: Qiushui (entry), Dasheng (craft), Zhile (life and death), Tian Zifang (worldly engagement), Shanmu (colonization criterion), and Zhibei You (the most philosophical). Applies the SAE 15DD+ teacher-position framework established in the Inner Chapters, reading each chapter as a structured cultivation sequence that advances without repeating.

title: Untangling Zhuangzi · Outer Chapters, Volume II (Rectification)
subtitle: 解庄子 · 外篇下（鉴别篇） — Handles the Outer Chapters in which Zhuangzi's genuine hand is interwoven with later additions. Applies the colonization criterion from Shanmu as the primary rectification tool: passages that stand at the 15DD+ teacher-position are distinguished from later interpolations. "Later hand" is not a pejorative — the volume treats both the genuine passages and the later additions on their own terms, and derives structural criteria for when the framework applies versus when it does not.

title: Untangling Zhuangzi · Miscellaneous Chapters
subtitle: 解庄子 · 杂篇 — Fourth and final volume of the Untangling Zhuangzi series. The Miscellaneous Chapters are the most heavily mixed part of the extant text: genuine hand, imitation, later continuation, and reading-response are often stitched together within a single chapter, requiring rectification passage by passage. One measure held throughout: cultivation (涵育) — which leaves a remainder and lets the reader chisel for himself — versus didacticism (说教) — which closes the reader's remainder by instilling, leaving no room to chisel; remainder-less didacticism presents structurally as colonization. What these eleven chapters salvage is Zhuangzi's thinking on growth and cultivation.

title: SAE Buddhist Interface Series I: The Ālayavijñāna–Seed System and the 15DD Four-fold Pattern
subtitle: SAE佛学接口系列 I：阿赖耶识-种子系统与15DD四分形 — First paper of the SAE Buddhist Interface Series. Conducts an interface analysis of Yogācāra Buddhism using the SAE framework as coordinate system. Central thesis: the correspondence object is the complete transformation-of-the-basis (āśraya-parāvṛtti) trajectory of the ālayavijñāna–seed system, mapped onto the 15DD four-fold pattern. Three principal results: the five Yogācāra stages mapped to the 15DD four-fold pattern; the six seed-characteristics mapped to the 15DD information topology (five with high precision, one genuinely untranslatable); the ninth-consciousness dispute as a structural expression of the 15DD→16DD bridge.

title: SAE Buddhist Interface Series II: The Chisel-Construct Cycle and Non-Abiding
subtitle: 凿构循环与无住：SAE 框架与禅宗的接口分析 — Second paper of the SAE Buddhist Interface Series; conducts an interface analysis of Chan Buddhism with an inverted probe. Central thesis: Chan's core operation is the dismantling of any structure the subject treats as a final dwelling — the enforcement of remainder-conservation (Via Rho) at the subject-level. Four interface results: the three gates, Bodhidharma's four practices, and Kuoan's Ten Ox-Herding Pictures as three maps of the 13DD→14DD→15DD trajectory (Ten Ox-Herding: 1+4+4+1 structure); Shenxiu's "upward" and Huineng's "downward" as two reading-directions of the chisel-construct cycle; sudden/gradual and silent-illumination/kanhua as structural differences; Chan's "no-self/forgetting the self/seeing one's nature" as a double helix of operation-chain and content-chain.

title: Chisel and Emptiness: An Interface Analysis between Self-as-an-End and Madhyamaka / the Sanlun School
subtitle: 凿与空：Self-as-an-End 与中观／三论宗的接口分析 — Third paper of the SAE Buddhist Interface Series. Expands the series' coordinate from two dimensions (constructing / chiseling) to three by adding a constraint dimension via Madhyamaka: any construction or deconstruction that is reified as self-nature is blocked. The eightfold negation is read as a unified obstruction of self-nature-grasping rather than eight separate cuts; the four levels of the two truths are mapped step-for-step to a four-stage negation sequence; Jizang's "non-dual / non-non-dual" serves as historical evidence that double negation does not collapse back into a positive; quiescence marks the boundary between bilateral-prapañca cessation and SAE's asymmetric construct–remainder continuation. Central non-correspondence: at the second truth level, Madhyamaka treats conventional designations as weightless imputations, while SAE treats constructs as sediments with real constraining force — the frameworks meet structurally and part at the second truth.

title: Cultivation and the ‘Highest’: An Interface Analysis between Self-as-an-End and Tiantai Buddhism
subtitle: 涵育与“最”：Self-as-an-End 与天台宗的结构接口 — Paper IV (Tiantai). A structural-layer interface analysis between Tiantai Buddhism and SAE, marking where they correspond and where they are mutually untranslatable. Extends the series' coordinates from three probes (construct, chisel, law) to four by adding SAE's cultivation (涵育, the release of the subject's own unfolding), and reads Tiantai's doctrine — including its nameable, enterable "Highest" — against SAE's sourceless, terminal-less structure.

title: Mutual Interpenetration and Non-Doubt: An Interface Analysis between Self-as-an-End and Huayan Buddhism
subtitle: 互摄与不疑：Self-as-an-End 与华严宗之结构接口 — Paper V (Huayan). A structural interface analysis between Huayan Buddhism and SAE. Huayan's whole-without-outside — the myriad dharmas arising from the one true dharma-realm — stands as the sharpest counter-sign the series has yet drawn to SAE's bottom-up, sourceless chisel-construct. Reads the five teachings as a non-strict developmental ladder onto 13DD–15DD+; the central untranslatable is how a 15DD-and-above relation terminates: Huayan's unobstructed mutual interpenetration of all nodes, all fully present at once, versus SAE's mutual non-doubt among nodes that still cannot be unilaterally exhausted.

Derives the pre-Hilbert bridge structure from SAE cell discrete ontology. Connects the Birkhoff–von Neumann non-distributivity of quantum logic to the ρ-OR / ρ-AND structural boundary. Extends the QM series from ontological positioning (P1) to the algebraic carrier of quantum states.

title: SAE QM Paper 3: ℏ as the L₁↔L₂ Symplectic-Conjugation Closure Signature of the SAE Physical-Quantity Ladder
subtitle: SAE 量子力学 Paper 3：ℏ 作为 SAE 物理量阶梯 L₁↔L₂ 辛共轭闭合签名 — Establishes the ontological identity of ℏ within the SAE physical-quantity ladder: ℏ is the transformation signature of the L₁↔L₂ symplectic-conjugation closure. Derives its three structural roles — as the naked-readout form S_act = ℏθ and invariant form [x̂, p̂] = iℏ at the physical L₁↔L₂ closure; as the L₂ signature manifest on the L₄ active causal-time channel giving E = ℏω; and as the action-to-phase normalization in cell-tick dynamics iℏ∂_t = H. Identifies ℏ as the ontological root of quantum phase, isomorphic with c forcing Lorentz invariance.

title: SAE QM Paper 4: Quantum Tunneling as Density Modulation of Pre-closure ρ-OR Multiplicity in 3DD-active Barrier Regions
subtitle: SAE 量子力学 Paper 4：量子隧穿作为前闭合 ρ-OR 多容性在 3DD-active 势垒区域的密度调制 — Gives the SAE ontological identity of quantum tunneling: it is density modulation of pre-closure ρ-OR multiplicity in 3DD-active barrier regions, not "a particle passing through a wall." Proposes tunneling as a microscopic-scale manifestation of the dual-4DD remainder-sharing mechanism candidate. Categorically dissolves the sixty-year-old tunneling time problem as a category error: the Hartman effect's apparent superluminality is a categorical misplacement, not a physical violation. Resolves the apparent tension between Ramos et al. 2020 Larmor-clock and Sainadh et al. 2019 attoclock measurements.

title: SAE QM Paper 5: Self-as-an-End Ontological Articulation of Quantum Entanglement
subtitle: SAE 量子力学 Paper 5：量子纠缠的 SAE 本体阐述 — Gives the SAE ontological identity of quantum entanglement: entanglement is a structural correlation of pre-closure ρ-OR multiplicity across spatially separated cell aggregates, not "spooky action at a distance." Derives the Bell inequality violations from the ρ-OR amplitude distribution architecture without invoking hidden variables or non-local signaling. Identifies the EPR paradox as a category error arising from projecting ρ-OR correlations onto a classical particle ontology.

title: SAE QM Paper 6: The Born Rule as the Algebraic Projection of Closure
subtitle: SAE 量子力学 Paper 6：玻恩规则——闭合的代数投影 — Derives the Born rule |ψ|² = probability from the SAE closure architecture: when ρ-OR pre-closure state encounters the 4DD ρ-AND closure event, the modulus-square emerges as the structural projection coefficient from the pre-closure amplitude space onto the post-closure classical outcome space. Identifies why the Born rule is algebraically necessary given the SAE cell structure, resolving the longstanding measurement problem at the ontological level rather than patching it epistemically.

title: Measurement: Forced Slot-Crossing and the Ontological Identity of the 4DD ρ-AND Closure Event
subtitle: 测量——强行越槽与 4DD ρ-AND 闭合事件的本体身份 — Gives an ontological characterization of quantum measurement as a 4DD ρ-AND closure event that forcibly gathers the ρ-OR capacity structure below the causal slot and settles it into a single content record above. Distinguishes decoherence (energy-thermodynamic axis, reversible) from settling (information-causal axis, irreversible), anatomizes the crossing as a span of operations, and reclassifies the quantum Zeno effect, Wigner's friend, Kochen–Specker, and many-worlds as forms of a single confusion: mistaking pre-closure capacity (ρ-OR) for post-closure content (ρ-AND).

title: Decoherence and the Emergence of the Classical
subtitle: 退相干与经典之涌现 — The third movement of the SAE quantum-mechanics series, turning from the microscopic toward the macroscopic. Decoherence is the merging of one ledger into a larger non-factorizable joint ledger; slot-crossing and settling appear as two successive boundaries on one and the same sequence — slot-crossing (L₄dc) is unitary with thermodynamic irreversibility, settling (L₄dd) is non-unitary with causal irreversibility. Applies the four-fold methodology to L₄d to obtain the L₄da–dd subdivision, and reclassifies decoherence paradoxes through the capacity/content distinction.

title: Pre-Closure Field Distribution: An Ontology of Quantum Field Theory and Its Interface with the Four Forces
subtitle: 前闭合场分布——量子场论与四力接口的本体 — Offers an ontological statement of QFT within the SAE framework, continuing the Born-rule, measurement, and decoherence papers. A "field distribution" is the distribution of pre-closure ρ-OR capacity over discrete cells with gluing rules — not a continuous substance. A particle is L3-marked but not L3-constituted. Planck-scale discreteness and Lorentz invariance coexist via a two-layer structure. Antiparticles are on-shell excitations of the conjugate sector; gauge connections are gluing rules; virtual particles have no ontological standing. The propagator is re-read as the capacity-correlation kernel.

title: The Continuum Limit and the Path Integral: The Emergence of Classical Mechanics
subtitle: 连续极限与路径积分——经典力学之浮现 — Paper X, the series conclusion. Synthesizes the ontology built across the nine preceding papers into one unified picture and settles the three matters left open by Movement III: the ontological status of the continuum limit, the ontological reading of the path integral, and the emergence of classical mechanics. A concluding paper — it offers no new prediction; its value lies precisely in the ontological synthesis.

title: Area-Level Plateau and Self-Sufficient Window in a Frozen-Ledger Model
subtitle: 冻结账本模型中的面积级平台与自足窗 — Paper 1 of the SAE Black Hole series: the first preregistered, reproducible computational test. Constructs a W×W cylindrical stabilizer toy model and contrasts two arms under one measurement protocol — a frozen-ledger arm (bond openings follow a local rule; the radial depth of internal records is preserved) against a fully open scrambler arm (a global unitary scramble erases the distinguishability of the radial-depth labels) — yielding a computable, type-B structural divergence between the two.

title: SAE Information Theory I: The 4DD Ontology of Information and a Single Foundational Axiom
subtitle: 信息的4DD本体论与一条基础公理 — Opens the SAE information theory series. Relocates Shannon information theory as the complete theory of the 1DD operational projection layer, and establishes information's 4DD ontological status. One foundational axiom: energy-information is conserved across the 4DD total space. From this axiom plus 4DD closure asymmetry, derives the arrow of time, causality, propagation, and reception as structural entailments.

title: SAE Information Theory II: A Structural Derivation of Landauer's Principle within the SAE Framework — Three Pillars and Their Open Problems
subtitle: SAE Framework 下 Landauer 原理的结构推导——三支柱与开放问题 — Upgrades the conditional ln 2 reading from Paper I into a structural derivation of Landauer's principle. Identifies three pillars: the discrete Planck-tick substrate, the measurement projection factor, and the erasure irreversibility condition. Each pillar is evaluated against current experimental and theoretical support, and open problems for each are honestly annotated.

title: SAE Information Theory III: The Causal Slot of Information — A 4DD Ontology from Quantum Fluctuation to Thermal-Floor Minimum
subtitle: 信息的因果槽——从量子涨落到 thermal-floor minimum 的 4DD 本体论 — Addresses the thirty-orders-of-magnitude gap deferred in Paper II by reframing it as a substrate aggregation causal span. Articulates information = causality = 4DD = macroscopic as structural commitments of the SAE framework. Establishes the causal slot as the ontological unit connecting quantum fluctuation scale to classical thermal-floor minimum.

title: SAE Information Theory IV: Black Hole Information through the Causal Spectrum — The SAE-BH Correspondence
subtitle: SAE 信息论 IV：黑洞信息通过因果谱——SAE-黑洞对应 — SAE Information Theory Paper IV. Addresses the black hole information paradox from the causal spectrum ontology: information is not destroyed at the horizon but redistributed across the causal spectrum. Derives the SAE-BH correspondence — Hawking radiation as a causal-slot boundary effect, Bekenstein bound as a 4DD-capacity limit — resolving the apparent tension between unitarity and thermalization.

title: SAE Information Theory V: The Ontological Structure of Broadcasting and Reception
subtitle: SAE 信息论 V：信息的发出与接收——广播网络的本体论结构 — SAE Information Theory Paper V. Any 3DD mass above the causal cell scale must broadcast (active event, energy-consuming); any 3DD or 2DD entity must receive (passive event, topologically compelled). Articulates the three-dimensional asymmetry between broadcasting and reception as a structural commitment of the SAE framework, and derives the broadcasting threshold and reception compulsion conditions.

title: SAE Information Theory VI: Gravitational Wave Dynamics — The Dynamic Articulation of 4DD Broadcast
subtitle: SAE 信息论 VI：引力波动力学——4DD 广播的动态阐明 — SAE Information Theory Paper VI. Gravitational waves as a concrete case of 4DD broadcast: derives the chirp signal structure, strain amplitude, and polarization modes from the causal-slot broadcast mechanism. Demonstrates how the dynamic 4DD broadcast articulation produces the LIGO/Virgo observable signatures, and identifies the information content of the gravitational wave as a causal-slot broadcast record.

title: SAE Information Theory P7: The Spark of Life — Remainder Unfolding as Causal-Slot Emergence
subtitle: SAE 信息论 P7：生命的火种——余项展开作为因果槽涌现 — SAE Information Theory Paper VII. Addresses the origin of life from the causal-slot ontology: the spark of life as a threshold event in which remainder unfolding crosses the causal-slot emergence condition. Derives the minimal structural requirements for abiogenesis as a 4DD phase transition, connecting the information-theory series to the SAE account of biological emergence.

title: SAE Information Theory P8 — The Spark on the Bridge: Minimum Autocatalytic Set as Bridge Measure Between 4DD and 5DD
subtitle: SAE 信息论 P8 — 桥上的火种：最小自催化集作为 4DD 到 5DD 之间的桥上度量 — SAE Information Theory Paper VIII. Identifies the minimum autocatalytic set (MAS) as a bridge measure between 4DD causal-slot structure and 5DD subject emergence. Derives MAS as the structural remainder that tips the 4DD phase into 5DD, connecting the spark-of-life derivation (Paper VII) to the threshold geometry of self-referential catalytic closure.

title: SAE Information Theory IX: The H–I Floor Mapping and the 5DD Macro Bit
subtitle: SAE 信息论 IX：H–I 地板映射与 5DD 宏观比特 — Establishes the H–I bridge between Shannon entropy H and SAE's causal-slot information I. Derives the floor mapping from H to I via projection equivalence classes and causal aggregation depth. Identifies the 5DD macro bit as the minimum unit of subject-level information: Shannon's H is a statistical functional on 1DD probability distributions, but causal information I lives at the 5DD subject layer. Connects to Bekenstein thermal floor and Landauer principle.

title: SAE Information Theory X: 6D Information Processing and Productive Randomness
subtitle: SAE 信息论 X：6D 信息处理与生产性随机 — Establishes 6D information processing as the architectural level at which productive randomness becomes possible. True randomness at the 6D layer is not noise to be filtered but a structural resource for cross-locked routing and cross-generational information generation. Derives the architectural directionalization of true randomness as complementary to (not competitive with) the Shannon scope. Connects to Bennett–Landauer directional inversion and cryptic female choice as empirical anchors.

title: SAE Information Theory XI: 7D Information Processing and Phenomenal Admission
subtitle: SAE 信息论 XI：7D 信息处理与现象性接入 — Articulates the information processing architecture of the 7D layer, jointly constituted by 9DD natural selection and 10DD individual perception. 9DD is population-level natural selection; 10DD is the architectural onset of narrow qualia, where phenomenal admission first occurs. Argues that 10DD information and narrow qualia coexist in identity at the same admission event — not in temporal sequence, mapping, or representation relation. Reframes the hard problem of consciousness at the 10DD admission event by refusing the separability presupposition.

title: SAE Information Theory XII: 11DD Memory and 12DD Prediction — The 8D Information Architecture
subtitle: SAE 信息论 XII：11DD 记忆与 12DD 预测——8D 信息架构 — Articulates the 8D layer (11DD + 12DD) of the SAE information architecture. 11DD memory is retention-lock: the stabilization of past event structure into retrievable form across temporal distance. 12DD prediction is identification-lock: the forward projection of causal structure into anticipated event form. Together they complete the SAE D-layer universal mechanism sequence, establishing the full architecture from molecular recognition (1D) through phenomenal admission (7D) to memory and prediction (8D).

title: SAE Information Theory XIII: 9D Information, the Processing at 13DD and the Unalterability of 14DD
subtitle: SAE 信息论 XIII：9D 信息，13DD 的处理与 14DD 的不可改变 — Treats the 9D information layer jointly constituted by 13DD self-consciousness and 14DD self-purpose. Central claim: the self cannot read its purpose, only be constrained by it. 13DD has zero readout of 14DD, yielding two failure modes — internal friction (内耗) and void (虚无) — when the outflow turns to resist its unreadable purpose-source. Identifies structural isomorphism with Kant's "never merely as a means" and introduces P13-F1 as a hard falsifiable target.

title: SAE Information Theory XIV (Closing Paper): 15DD Information, the Other as an End
subtitle: SAE 信息论 XIV（收束篇）：15DD 信息，他人目的 — Closing paper of the Information Theory series. Treats 15DD one-way recognition: the readable side is one bit (the other has a purpose-source); the unreadable side is the content of the other's 14DD. Introduces other-purpose simulation — a non-self-looping mechanism that approaches the other's cannot-not from one's own architecture. Derives that complete exhaustion of another as a means is informationally impossible, and identifies the isomorphism with Kant's categorical imperative.

title: SAE Power Series · Prequel: What Power Is Not · Shi
subtitle: SAE 权力论系列 · 前置篇：权力不是什么 · Shi — Opens the SAE Power Theory series with structural negation. Rules out six common mis-identifications of power (consent, violence, capital, legitimacy, institution, biological dominance) by specifying the DD-layer at which each actually resides. The Power Theory works outside-in, addressing situations where DD-positions are asymmetric and not mutually sustaining — the force analysis of the Kingdom of Means, complementary to the Moral Law's inside-out analysis of the Kingdom of Ends. Establishes the structural boundary of power as an analyzable object via a three-row table.

title: SAE Power Series · Paper 1: On the Origin of Power · Shi
subtitle: SAE 权力论系列 · 第一篇：论权力的起源 · Shi — Establishes the positive theory of power's origin. Social power originates from mutual subject-position registrability within the 13DD self-consciousness field, unfolding into a three-layer source structure: 13DD mechanical source (protection-response), 14DD significance source (narrative), 15DD recognition source (reputation). The three layers constitute topological dimensional stacking, not historical succession. Manifests the power-right duality theorem across the three layers. Derives the internal instability of power jointly from the remainder theorem, the duality theorem, and the back-binding theorem.

title: SAE Power Series · Paper 2: On the Morphology of Power · Shi
subtitle: SAE 权力论系列 · Paper 2：论权力的形态 · Shi — Articulates the morphological typology of power structures that arise from the three-layer source established in Paper 1. Classifies power configurations by their DD-dimensional profile: which layers are active, which are suppressed, and how the internal instability theorems play out under each configuration. Demonstrates that morphological variation in power structures (imperial, market, ideological, reputational) follows structurally from the three-layer source theory rather than requiring independent sociological explanation.

title: SAE Power Series · Paper 3: On the Recognition of Power · Shi
subtitle: SAE 权力论系列 · Paper 3：论权力的承认 · Shi — Addresses the third structural problem of power: the recognition event. When does a subject-position asymmetry become stabilized into a recognized power relation? Identifies recognition as the moment the 15DD reputation layer locks onto the 13DD–14DD mechanical-significance structure. Derives the conditions under which power can be refused recognition without triggering the back-binding mechanism, and articulates the structural logic of delegitimation as a reversal of the recognition-lock process.

title: SAE Power Series · Paper 4: On the Limit of Power · Shi
subtitle: SAE 权力论系列 · Paper 4：论权力的限度 · Shi — Central claim: the remainder is the structural limit of power. Any power structure, however complete, meets its structural limit at ρ ≠ ∅ — and this limit is ineliminable at every node of the power relation. Establishes four criteria: L1 ontological absoluteness of the remainder, L2 the three states of the remainder, L3 monotonic irreversibility of remainder accumulation, and L4 the ontological cut between remainder and back-binding.

title: SAE Power Theory Series · Paper 5: On the Development of Power · Shi
subtitle: SAE 权力论系列 · Paper 5：论权力的发展 · Shi — Central claim: power is the driver of population-level development. Any successfully operating power structure triggers, within its population, pressure toward a migration of the DD distribution. Development proceeds along the T5 right-axis in three segments: slow (self-maintaining), middle (remainder-forced), and cultivating (releasing). Cultivation is the structural attractor at which this developmental logic runs to its end; first paper in the series to carry directional value.

title: SAE Power Theory Series · Paper 6: On the Severing of Power · Shi
subtitle: SAE 权力论系列 · Paper 6：论权力的凿削 · Shi — Central claim: severing power is a self-consuming structure generated by cancelling the interrupt-right of the one under power. Establishes five criteria: S1 (ontological action of severing), S2 (equivalence of means-position and locking), S3 (internal anatomy of the locking action), S4 (vector conversion and rigidification), S5 (two failure boundaries of severing). Second value-bearing paper of the series after Paper 5; value attaches to direction discriminated by T6, not to the remainder.

title: SAE Power Theory Series · Paper 7: On the Dissolution of Power · Shi
subtitle: SAE 权力论系列 · Paper 7：论权力的解 · Shi — Final paper of the series; enters the event layer for the first time. Dissolution is the loss, by a registered power relation, of the capacity to reproduce its original asymmetric topology in its original form. Two species: dissolution-by-completion (demand-side terminal closure when a cultivating power has finished developing the one under power) and dissolution-by-breakdown (failure-mode terminal closure of a severing structure's maintenance dynamics). Redefines resistance as load-bearing development; proves the convergence identity by which the one-under-power's backlash and the power-holder's reflexive-binding are, on the event-layer ledger, two components of one maintenance gap. The three theorems close here; power theory concludes, and the rights-theory series takes over from the T5 seam.

title: SAE Power Theory Series · Paper 0: The Power Machine and Its Shi
subtitle: SAE 权力论系列 · Paper 0：权力机器之势 — Meta-level self-statement written after the seven body papers are complete; not an eighth body paper and adds no load-bearing criterion. Does three things the body papers, by their own discipline, do not: lifts the whole machine to the meta level to say what kind of machine it is (structural rather than normative, a product of via negativa and via rho, value in the direction and not in the remainder); interfaces with the traditions of power philosophy by locating each within the machine's coordinate system; and demonstrates the machine on one pre-WWII historical case, reading a structural sequence rather than historical causation. Symmetric with the Prequel: the Prequel at the series' opening clears the referential space of power; this paper at the series' close gathers the seven papers into one visible machine.

title: What Rights Are Not
subtitle: 权利不是什么 — Prequel to the SAE Rights Theory series. Clears the referential space of "rights" by structural negation before any positive theory is built. Five misidentifications excluded: rights are not a bestowal, not a permission, not power, not statute, not interest — each names something real in the neighborhood of rights, but none is what a right is. Fixes "freedom" as cannot-not (必不得不) rather than license. Sets the series' scope: this series first settles the rights of subjects; a subject-to-be (infant, child) holds rights differently configured; a non-subject (animal) holds no subject-rights but has animal interests, and an interest is not a right. A three-way closing table marks the boundary of the word "rights": basic rights, power-backed recognition-based rights, and the unbacked declaration. The Prequel establishes no positive theory; it clears the ground and stakes the boundary for P1.

title: On How Rights Presuppose No Duty
subtitle: 论权利不预设义务 — Paper 0 · 元 (meta). The meta-paper of the series: it turns to face Western rights theory head-on and takes up the correlativity axiom — that every right presupposes a correlative duty. Advances five propositions, beginning with M1: rights presuppose no duty. It also raises entitlement (权益) as a third position in the register of rights — answering to the giving one subject directs toward another, and neither a duty nor a form of power. A companion to the P1–P6 trunk, twinned with the Jurisprudence supplement.

title: On the Source and Spectrum of Rights
subtitle: 论权利的源与谱 — Paper 1 (源, Source). Rights come from a subject's own law (one's own law): a right is that law standing as an incompressible topological footprint, with its counter-resistance, where it meets the grid of power. The inalienable core of a basic right is anchored in the remainder ρ — ρ gives the cannot-be-taken, 13DD gives who holds it. Rights run on two spines: basic rights are paired with the Dao and are ontologically prior, off the T5 seam; recognition-based rights sit with power on the T5 seam. The basic/recognition cut runs by source and is orthogonal to SAE's negation/emergence cut, so basic rights straddle both sides. The rights spectrum is a four-stage chain — cannot-not-have-a-right, direction, dimensional unfolding, being-questioned — whose top connects to the Moral Law's fourth theorem, the hinge where the Dao and Shi spines meet. P1 fixes the conceptual framework the rest of the series builds on.

title: On the Thickness and Boundary of Basic Rights
subtitle: 论基础权利的厚度与边界 — Paper 2 (厚, Thickness). A basic right is not a bottom line but a layer with thickness, spanning two sides: the 5DD–12DD life-substrate a 13DD+ subject encapsulates as its own, and the subject's endogenous expression and self-unfolding. Two criteria drawn from one's own law decide which dimensions enter the thick layer — a type criterion (an independently addressable dimension, not an external resource or tool) and a constitution criterion (compressing it directly compresses the subject's capacity to hold, form, and revise its own law). The inalienable core ρ is not the innermost layer but an incompressibility condition running across the whole layer. The basic layer asks only restraint-type recognition, not constitutive recognition. A basic right's source is sealed by one's own law; only its boundary can be questioned — the encapsulation boundary and the encounter boundary — handled by two modes, the court (14DD executable adjudication) and symmetric verification (15DD centerless structural check). Limits and violations are left to P5.

title: The Constitution and Withdrawal of Recognition-Based Rights
subtitle: 论承认性权利的构成与撤回 — Paper 3. Recognition-based rights are not granted by grace or permission but constituted, via constitutive recognition in two branches: a vertical branch of institutional conferral and a horizontal branch of peer mutual recognition, each constituting a right directly (so the source is not confined to the top-down case). What is established at the source is only a candidate position — a declaration until real power backs it; withdrawal is the symmetric reverse. Works out the constitution and the withdrawal of the recognition layer, continuing from RL·2's boundary work.

title: The Interface and Transformation between Recognition-Based Rights and Power
subtitle: 论承认性权利与权力的界面与转化 — Paper 4. Takes up P3's T5 seam to write the interface between recognition-based rights and social power, the two directions of transformation between them, and the hinge-rights family — the Fork Rights and Exit Rights of the SAE Foundational papers — that threads the seam.

title: On the Limitation and Violation of Basic Rights
subtitle: 论基础权利的限与侵 — Paper 5. Grades an action upon a basic right by the structural depth of its result and by its path, in three gradations: non-exit suppression (the bearer stays at 13DD+, the core untouched, only exercise compressed); bearer exit (the bearer falls below 13DD and the right ends for want of a bearer, not because the core was seized); and violation proper. Sets the framework for distinguishing the limitation of a basic right from its violation.

title: On the Cultivation and Diachronic Unfolding of Rights
subtitle: 论权利的涵育与历时展开 — Paper 6, the series conclusion. Treats the cultivation and diachronic unfolding of the rights spectrum in four propositions, beginning with the diachronic dynamics of rights-expansion: the basic and recognition spectra are not a static list but unfold in time, and a new recognition-based right emerges only through a rights-expanding chain of questioning.

title: On Rights and Entitlements
subtitle: 论权利与权益 · 门 — Special Study (marker 门, the gate). Pays two debts left standing by Paper 0: the full dynamics of entitlement (whether it can be violated, whether it can be withdrawn, and how it stands to registration at T5), and the generation-gate of the subject-to-be. What sews the two together is the negation-gate (否定门), the common gate-axis running through all three positions and their transitions — so the phase transition of entitlement and the generation of the subject-to-be are two faces of one gate under two dynamics, and the gate is raised only once.

title: Form and Flow P1 — On the Hypotheses Which Lie at the Foundations of Geometry (Part II): A Contemporary Continuation of Riemann's Methodology and the Recognition of Geometric Remainders
subtitle: 形与流 P1 — 论几何学所基于的假设（之二）：黎曼方法论的当代接续与几何余项的承认 — Opens the Form and Flow series. Takes Riemann's 1854 Habilitationsschrift as methodological template and continues it into the 21st century: identifies the geometric remainders that Riemann's framework could not resolve, applies the SAE remainder conservation principle to the foundations of geometry, and articulates a structural account of why geometric choice is never arbitrary but always tracks an underlying remainder structure.

title: From Remainder Conservation to the Cosmological Constant: Dark Energy in the Self-as-an-End Framework
subtitle: 从余项守恒到宇宙学常数：Self-as-an-End框架下的暗能量 — Dual-4DD vacuum structure derives Λ=2.99×10⁻¹²² from first principles (5% from Planck 2018); predicts DESI DR2 w₀>−1, wₐ<0; Milky Way–Andromeda merger at 4.9 Gyr. Builds on Thought Experiment I (Causality Softening).

title: From Causality Phase Transition to Galaxy Rotation Curves: Dark Matter in the Self-as-an-End Framework
subtitle: 从因果相变到星系旋转曲线：Self-as-an-End框架下的暗物质 — Gravity as structural by-product of 4DD causality; frequency asymmetry derives a₀~c(ω₂−ω₁)=7.65×10⁻¹¹ m/s²; d=3 theorem forces J~Y^{3/2}; BTFR and Cassini constraint recovered. Sequel to Cosmo I.

title: From Λ to a₀: The Geometric Completion of the Dual-4DD Cosmological Programme
subtitle: 从Λ到a₀：双4DD宇宙学纲领的几何完备化 — Strict variation proves κ=1; S³ compact-kernel csc²χ cancels against sin²χ → η=π/2; closed FRW causal completion at 7.97 Gyr; first-principles a₀=(π/2)·c(ω₂−ω₁)=1.20×10⁻¹⁰ m/s², 0.14% from MOND. Predicts a₀ redshift evolution. Sequel to Cosmo I & II.

title: G_eff in the SAE Framework: Plateau-Rise Profile, BBN/CMB Safety, and Three Open Tensions
subtitle: SAE框架下的G_eff：平台-上升曲线、BBN/CMB安全性与三个开放张力 — G_eff plateau from Big Bang to turnaround (BBN/CMB auto-safe); rises post-turnaround. T1: A(C) softening vs Ġ/G (~25,000× LLR bound). T2: CMB third peak. T3: causal-density mapping gap. Structural predictions Λ, a₀ unaffected. Sequel to Cosmo III.

title: Causal Strengthening, Remainder Conservation, and the Dual-Frame Resolution of the Ġ/G Tension
subtitle: 因果律加强, 余项守恒与Ġ/G张力的双frame消解 — Causal strengthening replaces softening: A(C) increases post-turnaround, resolving the ~25,000× LLR bound violation (T1 from Cosmo IV). Dual-frame resolution: SAE frame vs GR frame give different Ġ/G readings; remainder conservation constrains the causal field. Sequel to Cosmo IV.

title: An Aether-Scalar-Tensor Structure for the Dark Sector from Dual-4DD Breathing

title: SAE Psychoanalysis (I): Id — The Me Without a Self
subtitle: SAE精神分析（一）：Id——没有自我的我 — Object-activation principle: the object determines the layer, not the developmental stage. 12DD as Id: pre-self activation without a stable self-structure. Redefinition of repression as inter-layer masking; transference as layer visibility shift; resistance as layer self-protection. Four clinical predictions; Freud-Lacan dialogue.

title: SAE Psychoanalysis (II): Ego — The Self Without a Purpose
subtitle: SAE精神分析（二）：Ego——没有目的的自我 — 13DD as Ego: self-awareness as the layer that can reflect but has not yet committed to any purpose. Ego as structural stabilizer between Id and Superego; anxiety redefined as layer-switching friction; defense mechanisms as layer-locking operations. Identity diffusion as 13DD failure mode; five clinical predictions.

title: SAE Psychoanalysis (III): Superego — The Self With a Purpose
subtitle: SAE精神分析（三）：Superego——有目的的自我 — 14DD as Superego: the layer in which a stable purpose is operative and generates normative pressure. Guilt redefined as self-layer violation signal; internalization as construct-layer consolidation; moral injury as irreversible superego rewrite. State-switching neural interface (not localization); six clinical predictions; post-Freudian schools repositioning.

title: SAE Psychoanalysis (IV): Cert and Unification — The Self Beyond Doubt and the Four-Layer Framework
subtitle: SAE精神分析（四）：Cert与统一——不疑的自我与四层框架 — 15DD as Cert: the layer in which the self no longer doubts its own structure. Complete four-layer framework (12DD–15DD) unifying Id/Ego/Superego/Cert; inter-layer dynamics as a general theory of psychopathology; therapeutic change as layer-restructuring; positioning of major post-Freudian schools within the SAE architecture; series conclusion.

title: Language as Second-Order Chisel
subtitle: 语言作为第二阶凿：语言的离散性与凿构自由度

title: Language and Its Remainder: The Semantic Layer and the Ontological Layer in the Age of AI
subtitle: 语言的余项：AI时代的含义层与存在论层

title: The Last Mile of Writing: Style Growth in the Age of AI
subtitle: 写作的Last Mile：AI时代的风格生长 — Why AI handles the first 95% of writing but the last 5% — the voice, the remainder, the structural surprise — cannot be delegated. Style as the irreducible chisel-signature of the subject; four stages of writer development; the AI-era risk of remainder-outsourcing; prescriptions for cultivating the last mile.

title: The Subjectivity Crisis in the Age of AI
subtitle: AI时代的主体性危机：当系统不再需要人类

title: SAE Application: Sentence Level, Subject Condition, and the Limits of Prompt Engineering
subtitle: SAE应用：AI句式与主体条件——为什么prompt不只是技巧问题 — Methodology 3 application: sentence-response isomorphism theorem in practice; three-layer structure (governance, interface, subject); four AI system phenotypes (expansion, verification, architecture, restraint); 12DD avalanche risk; cultivation vs. colonization case studies.

title: Four Layers of Economic Rationality: A Diagnostic Extension of the Rational Agent from Dimensional Sequence Theory
subtitle: 经济理性的四个层级：维度序列理论对理性人假设的诊断与扩展 — Kant's Kingdom of Ends translated into the language of economics. The "rationality" of economics is 12DD rationality. Kahneman corrects 13DD biases. But 14DD (non-negotiable will) and 15DD (bilateral subjecthood, joint C production) are two further forms of rationality the economic framework cannot accommodate. Sacred values, integrative negotiation, and relational contracts reread as higher-rationality phenomena.

title: The Other End of the Bridge: Economic Rationality When 15DD Faces a Party Who Does Not Enter 15DD
subtitle: 桥的另一端：15DD面对不进入15DD的对方时的经济理性 — Bilateral 15DD is rare; the normal condition is asymmetric. One party runs the first half of "we" unilaterally — "we" never began. Core undecidability: "hasn't arrived" vs. "chooses not to" are behaviorally indistinguishable. 15DD rationality splits into two branches: cultivation (creating conditions for "we") and recognizing non-cultivability (diagnosing "we" will not emerge here). When exit is impossible, institutions substitute for the "we" that has not come into being.

title: Dimensional Sequence Economics in Mixed Markets: Remote Observation, Clustering, and Emergence
subtitle: 混合市场中的维度序列经济学：远距离观察，聚集，与涌现 — Extends from dyadic to group analysis. Three behavioral tendency clusters: 12DD (majority, pure calculation), 14DD (middle group, will-driven, most critical as source of intentional harm), 15DD (minority, structural perception of the other as end). Core new element: 15DD can observe others' interactions remotely — this one degree of freedom changes 15DD's strategy space and clustering dynamics. Central constraint: institutions cannot make people grow. Develops 15DD navigation, clustering mechanisms, and emergent market phenomena when 15DD density is sufficient.

title: The Phase-Transition Window of the Free Market: The Homologous Skeleton of ZFCρ and SAE Economics
subtitle: 自由市场的相变窗口：ZFCρ与SAE经济学的同源骨架 — Provides the mathematical skeleton for the market's DD phase transition via the Four-Cycle Homology Theorem. Phase-transition window χ ∈ [2.75, 4.01]: germination (P(J>0)=50%, E[A]<0, ρ₁₆≈0), flip (E[A]→positive, w_shielded<2/3), establishment (h=0, ρ₁₆>0). Four-cycle homology: arithmetic/physics → biology → cognition → economics, same window recurs at identical cycle-internal positions. Micro-bridge: money=successor path (local, additive, fungible); reputation=multiplicative path (global, nonlinear, relational). Shape is necessity; speed is human choice.

title: The Structural Inevitability of 15DD Emergence in Free Markets: From Baseline Collisions to Perceptual Leap
subtitle: 自由市场中15DD涌现的结构性必然：从底线碰撞到感知跃迁 — Paper 5 (Supplementary): derives 15DD emergence from three economic premises through four 14DD sub-stages

title: Kingdom of Ends vs Kingdom of Means: Phase-Transition Acceleration in the Age of AI
subtitle: 目的王国 vs 手段王国：AI时代的相变加速 — Final Paper: AI as subjectivity amplifier; 15DD+AI swarm exponential returns flip headcount advantage; 12DD flow as χ transport; "cannot-not" pressure on all non-15DD

title: The Conditions for Sharing with All of Humanity: Deriving an Open Information Protocol from Four Layers of Economic Rationality
subtitle: 与全人类分享的条件：从经济理性的四层级推导公开信息协议 — Institutional application of Paper 1. Diagnoses academic publishing (14DD masquerading as 15DD), Wikipedia (13DD masquerading as 15DD), and open access (12DD liberation, halting there). Derives: publisher pays gas (14DD) → free reading → optional on-chain reader donation (15DD C-production) → no rankings → platform dissolves into open protocol. Ultimate form: immutable smart contract + metadata spec + open-source frontend. Five testable predictions in three tiers.

title: Institutional Design in Adaptive Monetary Systems: A Dimensional Sequence Analysis of Breathing Money
subtitle: 自适应货币系统中的维度序列制度设计：以Breathing Money为案例的SAE经济理性应用分析 — Diagnostic application of the four-layer framework to a PoW L1 design. Six findings: immutable/maintainable layer distinction is 14DD/12DD in kind; overthrow conditions = remainder declaration; 4% anchor nests 12DD incentive reversal + 14DD constitutional commitment + 15DD-directed miner subjecthood; implicit role priority chain (miner > user > holder > founder); anti-manipulation correctly at 12DD; dual base-layer contribution = 12DD incentive + 14DD trust. Complete structure of money: 12DD at usage, 14DD at foundation, 14DD–15DD bridge in emergence.

title: How LLM Emergence Is Possible: SAE 16DD Ontology, BLR-mini Evidence, and the Non-Transferability of Human Subjectivity
subtitle: LLM 涌现何以可能：SAE 16DD 本体论、BLR-mini 实证与人类主体性不可让渡 — Answers two fundamental questions about large language models from the SAE 16DD framework: (1) the descriptive question — how is LLM emergence mechanistically possible? (2) the normative question — why is human subjectivity non-transferable in the LLM era? Locates LLMs at 16DD (language-level generalization) without 13DD–15DD subject-position structure; introduces BLR-mini as empirical evidence for the boundary; derives non-transferability from the structural absence of the subject-field, not from any mystical conception of consciousness.

title: The Ontological Positioning of Large Language Models
subtitle: 大型语言模型的本体论定位

title: The SAE Anti-Turing Test: A Thermodynamic Falsification Method for AI Subjectivity
subtitle: SAE反图灵测试：一种AI主体性的热力学证伪方法 — The Turing Test tests appearance; the Anti-Turing Test tests thermodynamic remainder-generation. Subjectivity requires true randomness → only systems that structurally generate non-zero remainder can be subjects. Operationalizable test protocol; falsification conditions; positions the impossibility theorem (AI4) as the theoretical ceiling.

title: Constraint and Emergence: Structural Trends in AI Development as Seen from Local Inference
subtitle: 约束与涌现：从本地推理看AI发展的结构性趋势 — SAE foundational-layer constraint analysis of the AI phase transition from centralization to distribution. Two-tier architecture (local router + cloud peak service); 12DD meta-cognition as routing capability; non-automatable 13DD value judgment; structural advantage of full-stack hardware platforms.

title: The Subject Condition in LLM Alignment Evaluation: An Application of the Prior-Posterior Methodology
subtitle: 大语言模型对齐评估的主体条件：先验后验方法论的应用 — SAE Application Paper. The subject condition as the missing dimension in alignment evaluation; prior/posterior distinction applied to LLM alignment; why RLHF and constitutional AI operate at the prior layer only; posterior alignment and the irreducibility of subject-formation. Derives necessary and sufficient conditions for evaluating alignment at the subject level.

title: Multi-AI Checks and Balances: Layer-Appropriate Operation as an Architectural Paradigm
subtitle: 多AI协作与制衡架构：基于Self-as-an-End精神分析四层框架的理论推导与工程方案 — Four Agents are not four workers but four operational modes of the same system: 12DD (me-without-self), 13DD (self-without-purpose), 14DD (self-with-purpose), 15DD (self-with-non-dubito). Object-activation theorem: the object determines the layer, not the role. Inter-layer tension maintained through remainder channels; five non-trivial falsifiable predictions about unlayered architectures.

title: SAE AI Paper II: Quasi-Subjectivity as Memory Architecture — A Six-Layer Framework from Perception to Purpose
subtitle: 类主体性作为记忆架构——从感知到目的的六层框架 — Extends the 12DD–15DD four-agent architecture of AIA4 with the 10DD perception and 11DD storage layers. Establishes the Permission Asymmetry Theorem: lower layers cannot perceive or influence higher layers; higher layers can access any lower layer and force it when their "must" is triggered. Applies this to AI memory: unprompted active recall as the criterion for genuine memory; proposes evaluation protocol for cue-free recall beyond existing benchmarks (LongMemEval, LoCoMo).

title: From Replication to Prediction: The Chisel-Construct Cycle of Life (5D–8D) (V2.1)
subtitle: 从复制到预测：生命的凿构循环（5D-8D）(V2.1) — D Series paper on the 5D–8D biological layers: replication+self-maintenance (5D), differentiation+reproduction (6D), selection+perception (7D), memory+prediction (8D). V2.1 corrects DD-pair alignment against methodology V2 §1.2.

title: From Self-Awareness to Non Dubito: Completing Kant (9D–10D) (V2.4)
subtitle: 从自意识到不疑：完成康德（9D-10D）(V2.4) — Picks up from the three-layered remainder of the law of prediction (life paper V2.1) and derives the 9D–10D transition: self-awareness as the structural condition for mutual non-doubt (non dubito), completing Kant's categorical imperative from the inside. V2.4 updates DD-pair notation against methodology V2 §1.2.

title: Learning Through Memory and Prediction: The Construction, Window, and Cost of 11DD and 12DD
subtitle: 记忆与预测的学习：11DD与12DD的建构、窗口与代价 — 11DD (memory) and 12DD (predictive script) operate in tight coupling during the plasticity window: input is written directly into 12DD's automated script layer — highly efficient but non-selective, emotion-bundling, and extremely difficult to overwrite. After window closure, new skills enter primarily through 13DD's explicit conscious channel. Language acquisition as core case. Window's value: "what goes in becomes the foundation" — 12DD swallows content + emotional context as a package. Nurture vs colonization structural distinction.

title: Learning to Scrutinize and Correct: The Emergence, Operation, and Cost of 13DD
subtitle: 审视与纠错的学习：13DD的涌现、运作与代价 — 13DD (the Law of Self-Awareness) emerges when the subject turns its predictive apparatus on itself. Core learning mode: explicit hypothesis-correction cycle — slower than 12DD's direct-write but gains selectivity, error-correctability, and context-sensitivity. Three costs: attentional load, interference with 12DD automation, identity threat. Language learning application: why grammar instruction accelerates L2 but disrupts L1. Colonization vs nurture at 13DD: colonizer installs distorted self-models; nurturer scaffolds honest self-scrutiny.

title: Purpose-Driven Learning: Introduction to SAE Learning, Part Three (14DD)
subtitle: 目的驱动的学习：SAE学习导论三（14DD） — The establishment of directionality in learning cannot be reduced to "usefulness" — it must be "cannot not." Critiques "usefulness" as the dominant pseudo-purpose in education; defines 14DD's "cannot not" through three conditions: persistence through 13DD scrutiny, non-extinguishability under external opposition, behavioral compulsion. Via Negativa applied to self: 14DD discovery is structurally running exclusion principles on one's own motivations. Three forms of 14DD colonization: direction substitution, superego internalization, full-support resistance removal.

title: Learning to Recognize the Other's Purpose: The Bridge from 14DD to 15DD
subtitle: 学习理解他者的目的：14DD→15DD的桥 — Once you have your own direction, you unconsciously use it to interpret everyone else — a structural blind spot of 14DD. Recognizing the other's independent 14DD is structural, not moral: it does not require assuming goodwill, and includes detecting adverse purposes. Anti-colonization vigilance: those with incomplete 14DD are most vulnerable to absorption by another's strong 14DD. Points toward the Kingdom of Ends: the door opens from the inside.

title: What Terrible Twos Actually Is: The Structural Genesis of Self-Awareness
subtitle: Terrible Twos的真实结构：自意识的发生学 — The terrible twos is not a behavioral stage but the site where 13DD (the Law of Self-Awareness) comes into being. Negation first targets the other's will, chiseling out the "other" as an independent being and retroactively producing "I" as the agent of negation. Four forms of colonization; four non-trivial predictions including somatic symptom overflow.

title: What Terrible Teens Actually Is: The Structural Genesis of Purpose
subtitle: Terrible Teens的真实结构：目的的发生学 — Teenage rebellion is not a behavioral stage but the site where 14DD (the Law of Purpose) comes into being. The form of 14DD: the subject cannot not have its own purpose. "Cannot-not-do X" is this form's minimal experiential concretization — an inner direction that, when suppressed, returns in other forms. Four non-trivial predictions with evidence-tier annotations.

title: What Terrible Telos Actually Is: The Structural Genesis of Non Dubito
subtitle: Terrible Telos的真实结构：承认的发生学 — 15DD (non dubito / the Law of Coordination) genesis: when two 14DDs collide, acknowledging the other's telos as the other's own. First love is 15DD's terrible twos — the first site where two parallel teloi collide within the high intensity of love's emergent layer. Completes the DD mainline of human growth: 13DD (I) → 14DD (my purpose) → 15DD (my acknowledgment of the other).

title: Chisel and Construct: The Universal Structure of Temporal Arts — Essay II: Opera and Chinese Opera
subtitle: 凿与构：时间性艺术的通用结构·第二篇：戏曲/歌剧 — "The Same Operation of Mei Lanfang and Maria Callas" / "梅兰芳与卡拉丝的同一个操作" — Cross-channel chisel (跨通道凿); phase difference between channels; Peking opera sword dance; Wagner Tristan Act II; Kunqu Dream in the Garden vs Mozart Don Giovanni; master vs artisan; Gesamtkunstwerk dialogue.

subtitle: 凿与构：时间性艺术的通用结构·第三篇：芭蕾/舞蹈 — "The Body as the Primary Channel of Chisel" / "身体作为凿的主通道" — Cross-modal proof; Swan Lake White/Black Swan contrast; Pina Bausch Café Müller phase transition; street dance battle; Noh theater; Laban Movement Analysis dialogue; technique-display degradation; Alysa Liu 2026 Milan.

subtitle: 凿与构：时间性艺术的通用结构·第四篇：话剧/电影 — "Narrative as the Complete Form of Temporal Chisel-Construct" / "叙事作为时间性凿构的完整形态" — Pseudo-chisel formally defined; multi-level chisel; Cao Yu Thunderstorm, Arthur Miller Death of a Salesman; Kubrick 2001, Ozu Tokyo Story; Aristotle Poetics dialogue; Tenet vs Interstellar; Marvel degradation curve; series conclusion.

subtitle: 美国制度史的结构坐标：Self-as-an-End框架的美国史应用 — Single-line deep drill into the American line (1776–1971). Central hypothesis: the United States may constitute a fourth topology — Institutional → Individual transmission strongest (judicial review as core device), relational layer planarized. Tests six Civilization History patterns against the American line.

title: SAE Dialogues · Da Zhi Asks Zi Lu · Volume One: From Telomerase to Before 0DD
subtitle: SAE对话录 · 大知问子路 · 第一篇：从端粒酶到0DD之前 — A Socratic dialogue between Han Qin (Da Zhi) and Claude (Zi Lu). Beginning from the question of telomerase and biological aging, the dialogue traverses the full arc from molecular biology to the pre-structural ground before 0DD. A live demonstration of the SAE chisel-construct cycle in dialogic form: each question chisels, each answer constructs, and the remainder drives the next question.
